overall.description: Cinematic game footage of a greenhouse herbology classroom with students tending to magical plants at wooden tables. The scene features lush vegetation, warm natural lighting through glass panels, and high-quality environmental details typical of a AAA game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: greenhouse herbology classroom with potting tables

student in green robes walks past the central tables toward the left
student in green robes exits the left side of the frame

entered.detail: arched glass and metal framework ceiling with green support beams
long wooden tables with soil and plants arranged in rows
potted plants suspended from the ceiling in woven baskets
cobblestone or stone tile flooring with drainage channels
tall glass panels forming the greenhouse walls with metal frames
tables with purple flowering plants and green foliage
tables with orange gourd-like plants and vegetables

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a greenhouse classroom filled with lush vegetation and students working at wooden potting tables. Natural light filters through the glass roof and walls, illuminating purple flowers and orange plants. A student in green robes walks across the scene from right to left, passing between the tables while other students remain seated tending to their plants.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a vibrant greenhouse classroom where students engage in the study of magical flora. It begins with a wide view of the space, capturing the interplay of natural light filtering through the glass roof and walls to illuminate clusters of purple and orange plants. As the camera holds its position, the stillness of the seated students tending to their potting tables is broken by a student in green robes. This figure moves fluidly across the frame from right to left, weaving between the wooden workstations before exiting the scene.
